stack.design_system: custom glassmorphism on top of shadcn/ui + Tailwind 4

glass_system.nav: background rgba(15,17,23,.35) + backdrop-blur 24px + 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08) border + box-shadow 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.45)

test_cases.name: Hero mount scale + fade-in

trigger.detail: Fires once when TerraPage sets isLoaded = true in first useEffect

pass_criteria: Hero section begins at opacity 0 and scale 1.03 on initial render
Reaches opacity 1 and scale 1.0 by 1200ms ± 200ms
Easing feel: slow-fast-slow with gentle settle (not linear, not ease-in-out)
test_cases.verification_method: browserbase_stagehand_navigate then browserbase_screenshot at mount + 600ms + 1300ms; compare scale and opacity

test_cases.name: Hero background parallax

trigger.detail: window.scroll — bound to scrollY state in useEffect

pass_criteria: Scrolling 100px moves the parallax overlay 50px upward
Base layer has background-attachment: fixed (scrolls against viewport)
No jank — 60fps on modern hardware
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase: scroll 200px, observe overlay translateY = -100px via computed style

test_cases.name: Hero content parallax
pass_criteria: Hero content wrapper moves at 0.2× scroll speed
Content moves SLOWER than background overlay (0.2 < 0.5) so content visually lags
test_cases.verification_method: Scroll 200px, measure content translateY = -40px

test_cases.name: Dynamic word swap on hero headline
pass_criteria: Word in headline changes every 3s
During swap: opacity goes 100 → 0 (blur lg) → swap → 0 → 100 (blur 0)
Word list cycles in order, loops forever
AnimatedText character reveal plays on each new word (coupled via key remount)
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase: wait 10s on page, capture text every 200ms, confirm word list cycles

test_cases.name: AnimatedText character-by-character reveal

trigger.detail: component remounts when parent key changes

pass_criteria: Each character is wrapped in its own motion.span
Characters appear sequentially with 30ms offset
Spaces preserved (rendered as non-breaking space)
Full word reveal completes within ~700ms for a 7-character word
test_cases.verification_method: framer-motion — inspect per-character spans and initial/animate props

test_cases.name: Stagger-reveal entry cascade
pass_criteria: Hero block elements reveal in cascade: headline span 1 → span 2 (90ms) → subheading (180ms) → CTA (270ms) → dashboard (360ms)
Each element fades up with simultaneous blur reduction
Animation-fill-mode is forwards (elements remain visible after)
test_cases.verification_method: Screenshot at t=100ms, 200ms, 300ms, 400ms, 500ms, 1300ms; verify cascade order

test_cases.name: Dashboard 3D scroll-tilt

values.formula: rotateX(0deg) when dashboardRef.top >= 0.8*vh, rotateX(15deg) when top <= 0.2*vh, linear interp between

pass_criteria: Dashboard tilts from 0deg to 15deg as it scrolls from 80% viewport height to 20% viewport height
Perspective is set on a parent wrapper (not the animated element)
Smooth transition (50ms) between scroll-driven values
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase: scroll to multiple positions, inspect computed transform matrix

test_cases.name: Dashboard slide-up on mount
pass_criteria: Dashboard image enters from 200px below its resting position
Duration 600ms ± 100ms
Easing is punchy expo-like (fast middle, slow ends)
Plays simultaneously with A06 stagger-reveal wrapper (which has its own 900ms animation + 360ms delay)
test_cases.verification_method: Screenshot at mount + 300ms + 700ms; verify translateY

test_cases.name: Partner logo infinite marquee
pass_criteria: Logo strip scrolls continuously right-to-left
Seamless loop (second copy of 8 logos is rendered to fill the gap)
40s per complete cycle
Opacity 0.4 default, 0.6 on hover (500ms transition)
Logos rendered brightness-0 invert (monochrome white)
prefers-reduced-motion pauses the animation
test_cases.verification_method: Record 45s of page; verify continuous motion and loop seam invisibility

test_cases.name: Animated counter on scroll-into-view
pass_criteria: Counter starts at 0 when 50% of the grid is visible
Reaches target value in ~60 frames (960ms)
Numeric value formatting preserved (decimal, suffix: M, K+, %)
Does not restart on re-enter (observer disconnects after first trigger)
test_cases.verification_method: Scroll metrics section into view, screenshot at 0/500/1000ms, OCR the values

test_cases.name: Feature carousel auto-rotation

trigger.detail: setInterval every 6000ms; resets on autoRotationKey change

pass_criteria: Active feature rotates through 4 items on 6s cycle
Cross-fade between images takes 300ms
User click on any feature immediately switches + resets the 6s countdown
Mobile: single image element cross-fades
Desktop: stacked-card deck rotates (see A12)
test_cases.verification_method: Wait 30s, capture active feature index; verify cycles forward through all 4

test_cases.name: Feature stacked-card 3D offset (desktop)
pass_criteria: 4 cards visible stacked, offset 16px right and 2% smaller per position back
Front card (position 0): full opacity, scale 1.0, z-index 4
Back card (position 3): opacity 0.15, scale 0.94, translateX 48px, z-index 1
Transition is 600ms ease-out
Only renders on md+ breakpoints (hidden on mobile)
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase desktop 1920×1080: click each feature, capture z-index + transform of all 4 cards

test_cases.name: Active-feature progress bar countdown

trigger.detail: rendered only when selectedFeature === i; remounts on each feature change

pass_criteria: Progress bar visible only under the active feature
Animates from 0% to 100% width over 6s (matching A11 cycle)
Resets to 0% when user clicks a different feature (due to remount)
test_cases.verification_method: Capture progress bar width at t=0/2000/4000/6000ms after feature click

test_cases.name: FAQ accordion expand/collapse
pass_criteria: Click header expands answer panel within 300ms
Chevron rotates 180deg simultaneously
Click same header again collapses
Click different header collapses current + expands new (accordion behavior)
Only one item open at a time
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase: click each FAQ in sequence, assert expansion state

test_cases.name: CTA section fixed-attachment parallax
pass_criteria: CTA background image stays fixed relative to viewport while content scrolls over it
Gradient overlay darkens the top of the section for text readability
test_cases.verification_method: Scroll past CTA; verify background image does not scroll with content

test_cases.name: Gradient text clip on emphasis words
pass_criteria: Emphasis words render as gradient-filled text (pink-peach)
Applied consistently to H2 emphasis words across sections: Impact, matters, questions
Gracefully degrades to solid color in browsers without -webkit-background-clip
test_cases.verification_method: Computed style inspection — color should be transparent, background-image should be the gradient

test_cases.name: Wordmark click scrolls to top
pass_criteria: Page smoothly scrolls to y=0
Uses native smooth scroll behavior
test_cases.verification_method: Scroll to y=1000, click wordmark, verify y=0

test_cases.name: Nav link → section anchor scroll
pass_criteria: Click Impact → smooth scroll to #metrics
Click Projects → #map
Click Technology → #narrative
Click FAQ → #faq
Click Join us → #cta
Mobile: clicking any link also closes the fullscreen menu
test_cases.verification_method: Click each nav link, verify scrollY position and visible section

test_cases.name: Mobile menu toggle
pass_criteria: Hamburger icon becomes X when menu is open
Fullscreen overlay slides into view (bg-[#0B0C0F]/95 + backdrop-blur-md)
Large serif links become visible
Clicking X dismisses the menu
Clicking any menu link also dismisses
test_cases.verification_method: Browserbase mobile 375×812: click hamburger, verify overlay present; click X, verify dismissed

test_cases.name: Feature card click with rotation reset
pass_criteria: Active border changes from white/10 to white/20
Icon color changes from text-green-500/60 to text-green-400
Progress bar mounts under the newly-active card and animates from 0% to 100% over 6s
Image cross-fades (300ms) to the selected feature's image
6s auto-rotation interval resets (via autoRotationKey increment)
test_cases.verification_method: Click feature 3; wait 3s; verify still on feature 3 (would have auto-rotated without reset)

test_cases.name: FAQ accordion toggle
pass_criteria: Click closed item → expands (max-height + opacity transition)
Click open item → collapses
Click different item → old collapses, new expands (accordion pattern)
Chevron rotates 180deg on expand
test_cases.a11y_gap: Missing aria-expanded and aria-controls — flag in recreation
test_cases.verification_method: Click 6 FAQs in sequence; after each, verify only one is open

test_cases.name: Feature auto-rotation reset on user interaction
pass_criteria: The 6s setInterval is torn down and recreated on autoRotationKey change
User click gets ~6s of 'their chosen feature' before auto-rotation resumes
test_cases.verification_method: Click feature 3 at t=0; verify at t=5.5s still on feature 3; verify at t=6.5s on feature 0

test_cases.name: World map marker (not wired in source)

trigger.detail: WorldMap component has projection math and handlers scaffolded but JSX only renders

pass_criteria: NOTE: This is a scaffolded-but-not-rendered feature
Projection: d3.geoNaturalEarth1, centered on average of 5 experience lat/lng
getMarkerPosition(exp) returns [x, y] pixel coords
colorMap and colorClassMap defined for pink/yellow/green/blue markers
handlers onSelectExperience and hoveredExp state exist but have no DOM attachment
test_cases.recreation_note: To make this work, render <svg> with <circle> elements positioned via getMarkerPosition and attach onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave/onClick

rationale: Two scroll-driven animations with different mathematical mappings (A02/A03/A07)
One half-finished feature (world map) with dead code path
Full glass morphism system with 6 glass variants
Mobile/desktop branching on feature carousel (stacked-card desktop vs cross-fade mobile)
NOT complex enough for 8+ because: only 1 route, no backend, no shaders/WebGL, no physics, no scroll-linked video or canvas
